//: MyMoolah Treasury Platform — GitHub Codespaces configuration.
//1: Kept deliberately minimal: no image override, no features, no remote user
//2: changes. GitHub continues to use its default universal dev image and all
//3: existing project tooling (node, npm, git, etc.) is inherited unchanged.
//6: 1. Forwards ports 3000 (frontend) and 3001 (backend) as PUBLIC by default.
//7: Without this, Codespaces defaults forwarded ports to 'private', which
//8: silently causes the frontend → backend preflight to be 302-redirected
//9: to github.com/login and surfaces in the browser as a misleading
//11: 2. onCreateCommand wipes any stale git-lfs-owned hooks in .git/hooks/ so
//13: lfs' feature can reinstall them cleanly. Without this, a leftover
//14: pre-push hook from a previous session causes the feature's postCreate
//15: to exit 2 with 'Hook already exists: pre-push', which in turn aborts
//16: ALL postCreate commands (including ours) and boots the Codespace in
//18: 3. Runs scripts/codespaces-bootstrap.sh on every create/rebuild to
//19: re-hydrate tools that live in $HOME (wiped on rebuild): google-cloud-
//20: sdk and node_modules. The script is idempotent, safe to re-run, and
//21: never fails the Codespace boot (exit 0 unconditionally).
//23: This file is read ONLY by Codespaces — local dev, Cloud Run (UAT / staging /
//24: production) and CI ignore it completely.
name: MyMoolah Backend (Codespaces)
